name: Stanley Pines
description:
Patching him up♡

Request!!<3<3

He had a fight with Camplenter, "but you should have seen how he ended up!"

Young Stanley Pines again!! thank you for your requests<3<3

Today I bring you a little more of my art too, it's been a long time since I drew, not even that which was something simple x)

Don't worry if you want to make as many requests as you want, it's still give me more ideas for content that everyone can enjoy!♡

I'm sorry if it took me a few days, you don't know how the school is giving me–

Have a wonderful everything!

Request link!
creator: X_de
